label: Orders Table
description: Full orders table with integrated filters, sorting, status badges, and inline cancel and amend actions.

checks.0.1_error_boundary: pass — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89
checks.0.4_no_any_ts_ignore: pass — no any or @ts-ignore; as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[] casts on export data are type-safe narrowings
checks.0.5_no_mock_imports: pass — widget imports only from context, shared, and ui components
checks.0.6_loading_state: pass — isLoading passed to TableWidget which renders skeleton
checks.0.7_empty_state: pass — emptyMessage="No orders match your filters" passed to TableWidget
checks.0.8_error_state: pass — error={error ? "Failed to load orders" : null} + onRetry={refetch} passed to TableWidget
checks.0.9_dead_code: pass — no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required.

checks.1.1_data_from_context: pass — all data (filteredOrders, filters, actions) exclusively from useOrdersData()
checks.1.2_context_uses_global_scope: pass — orders-data-context.tsx uses useGlobalScope() and scopeStrategyIds
checks.1.3_org_filter: pass — scopedOrders filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds
checks.1.4_client_filter: pass — getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; cascades through org→client→strategy
checks.1.5_strategy_filter: pass — local strategyFilter + globalScope.strategyIds both applied in context
checks.1.6_no_filter_shows_all: pass — scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips filter, returns all orders
checks.1.7_reference_data_location: pass — widget has no inline reference data; ASSET_CLASS_OPTIONS from context is a domain type constant

l1.notes: Context (read-only): imports from lib/mocks/* are dev-mode data sources in the context layer, not in the widget. Acceptable per spec.
